description.value:
The power is never owed — it answers strength. Attempt an Intimidation check against the Call DC (your Call DC: 20 + 2 × attunement, and unlike the Release DC it never stops growing).

  • Critical Success The Ansu answers eagerly: Communion begins and the mastery feeds the Climb (+1).
  • Success Communion begins.
  • Failure The Ansu does not deign. The action is spent; you may try again.
  • Critical Failure The Ansu comes anyway — it seizes the body for 1 round (the GM plays you), then Communion continues under your control.

Duration 1 round / 3 rounds / 1 minute by tier (1 round at Trial, 3 rounds at Discipline, 1 minute at Union). Every Communion active materializes on your sheet alongside the buff and vanishes when it ends. Ending Communion early — or when it expires — takes a Will save against the Release DC (your Release DC). From attunement 2, a successful Invoke includes a free Stride (Bull's Footing). At Mastery the Call is no longer rolled.
